title: Minecraft Season
description: A Minecraft mod for the team that enhances graphics, effects and performance.
body:
# _**For US**_
_**More FPS, smoother pings, and better animations... <3**_

With this modpack, Minecraft not only looks amazing but runs super smoothly with higher FPS! Even with enhanced graphics and detailed textures, the gameplay remains seamless. 
- **Smoother than reality**
- **Smooth animations**
- **Still the classic Minecraft feel!**

![Shader with intense shadows](https://i.imgur.com/EIbMU6R.png)

It’s the perfect blend of visuals and performance ideal for anyone looking to get more out of Minecraft without sacrificing FPS!
- **Shaders with intense shadows**
- **Epic third-person view**
- **Minimap**
- **Water effects**

![Epic third-person view with minimap](https://i.imgur.com/ryghOCf.png)
